title: Flight Sim Award 2026
teaser: MobiFlight wins the prestigious Flight Sim Award 2026 for its innovative features and community impact.

title: MobiFlight v11 Released
teaser: Fresh new look, redesigned UI, new project concepts and easier sharing. The biggest release ever.

title: FSWeekend 2026 Recap
teaser: We had an amazing time meeting the community. Thank you to everyone who stopped by.

title: New Hardware Support Added
teaser: Raspberry Pi Pico W and several new Arduino-compatible boards are now fully supported.
